sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72525" key="oi)nope/pantos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνο-πέπαντος</orth>, <sense id="n72525.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ripe for wine-making,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βότρυς</foreign> ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0188.tlg001:6:232" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.232</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
